title: Final energy use in public activities within the geographical area, MWh/inhabitant (Malmö stad)
description:
[Publisher: Malmö stad] Final use of energy measured in megawatt hours (MWh) divided by the number of
inhabitants in the municipality. Refers to final use that occurs in public
activities, regardless of fuel type, within the boundaries of the geographical
area. Source:

The Swedish Energy Agency and Statistics Sweden (via Kolada)
